name: Colorado Ski Country
author: soccerjonj
description:
Custom map of Eagle/Vail and many of its surrounding areas (Colorado Ski Country) such as Steamboat Springs, Aspen, Breckenridge, Keystone, etc. Generated using 2023 LODES Census Data and added demand for the following:

Universities: Colorado Mountain College Campuses: Steamboat Springs, Vail Valley, Dillon, Breckenridge, Leadville, Aspen, Carbondale, Glenwood Springs, Spring Valley at Glenwood Springs

Entertainment/Tourism: Breckenridge Ski Resort, Vail Ski Resort, Keystone Resort, Copper Mountain, Steamboat Ski Resort, Beavercreek Resort, Aspen Ski Resort, Sunlight Mountain Resort, Arapahoe Basin, Loveland Ski Area, Granby Ranch
